description:
Shared SwiftUI package (proposed slug `release-verification-ui`) that any release app embeds to give humans a one-tap verification flow. Surface: a `ReleaseVerificationView` that shows the artifact preview (passed as a SwiftUI subview from the artifact-viewer-components package) + a primary button 'Looks correct — verify' + secondary buttons for the other verdicts (wrong-content / partial-issue / could-not-verify). On tap, captures verdict + notes (mandatory for wrong-content / partial-issue per the schema invariant), optionally a screenshot via macOS screencapture, then writes a `HumanVisualVerification` entry into the appropriate `ReleaseOperationItem.humanVerifications` array via JSON edit on disk. Package depends on `release-operations-schemas-v000-001-000` for the Codable types and on `WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI` for the per-artifact viewers. First consumer: launch-calendar.

DEPENDENCY SATISFIED 2026-05-15: release-artifact-viewer-components shipped as WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI at wrkstrm-components/private/release-artifact-ui/spm/wrkstrm-release-artifact-ui/. Ready to start when next session picks it up.
title: Build release-verification-ui SwiftUI package: button + verdict capture writes HumanVisualVerification
